archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Organic & Earthy (Modern Fintech)

rules: No all-caps for headings; use Title Case.
Tabular lining for all numbers and statistics.

components.button: bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-full transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-sm
components.card: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 transition-shadow duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_12px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)]
components.badge: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-secondary text-white

layout_patterns.hero: Left-aligned confident heading with right-side composition of a stylized trading dashboard mockup. No centered generic hero.
layout_patterns.features_bento: Asymmetric bento grid for the 5 product types. Generous gap-8. Mix tall and wide cards.
layout_patterns.pricing: Side-by-side cards. Pro plan highlighted with subtle purple (secondary) top border and badge.
layout_patterns.faq: Minimalist accordion, hairline bottom borders, no heavy boxes.
layout_patterns.footer: Multi-column, large let's talk/CTA at the bottom, generous py-24 padding, light background.

motion.scroll: Use framer-motion for subtle fade-up and slight scale (0.98 -> 1) on scroll.
motion.hover: Smooth transform (-translate-y-1) and shadow increase on interactive cards.

image_urls.description: Primary logo (dark text, lime icon) to be used on light nav.
Logo for dark backgrounds if used.
Trader avatar for UI mockups (e.g., 1v1 duel).
Opponent trader avatar for UI mockups.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based strings (e.g., 'login-form-submit-button', 'product-1v1-card').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a light-mode primary theme with #FAFAF7 background.
Use Satoshi (or Geist/General Sans) for text. Never use Inter or Roboto.

For the hero mockup, do not just insert an image. Build a stylized composite component showcasing a 'duel dashboard' using Tailwind divs (live P&L, two trader avatars, equity chart) that looks like a high-end fintech component.
Buttons should use lime green (#B4E04C) with dark text for maximum contrast and approachability.
